title: King of Lizards (Komodo Dragons)
description: A new beloved creature to spice up your world!
body:
**This mod requires geckolib to function and can be used in any modpack!**

# Komodo Dragons
... are neutral animals that spawn in savannas. They like to hunt chickens and rabbits and they'll poison whom they're attacking, in normal and hard difficulties.

![Komodo dragons chilling!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31d10016ddad1b92cacf40adda0c3d24d9f18c53.png)

# Bacterial Saliva
Once any mob has been killed by a komodo dragon, it will drop a bacterial saliva. This can be used to make poison tipped arrows and potions.
